turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Responding to Feedback or a Performance Review

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Responding to Feedback or a Performance Review : “ • “Hi, I’ve just finished my class presentation. Could you talk about it?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! Overall, you did a solid job presenting your ideas clearly and staying on topic. How did you feel it went, especially the part you were most nervous about?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright — you’re asking, “Was it good?” Yes, it was good overall, especially your structure and clarity. What specific part would you like more feedback on—content, delivery, or confidence?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure. Your confidence was decent, but you sometimes spoke a bit quietly and avoided eye contact, which made you seem unsure at moments. How did you feel while you were speaking—nervous, rushed, or mostly calm?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I understand — that’s very normal. Even so, you managed to get through the presentation and your message was clear, which is a good sign. What do you think made you most nervous: the audience, forgetting your points, or something else?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it. That makes sense — presenting in front of people can be intimidating. Next time, try focusing on one friendly face at a time and slowing your breathing at the start. Would you like a simple sentence you could say to respond confidently to this feedback in real life?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure. You could say: “Thank you for the feedback. I was nervous about the audience, but I’m working on building my confidence and staying calm while speaking.” Would you like a slightly more formal or more casual version?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course. You could say: “Thank you for your feedback. I felt nervous presenting to the audience, but I’m actively working on improving my confidence and delivery.” Would you like to practice saying it together, or would you like an alternative formal version?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. Thank you, and well done on completing your presentation.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’re welcome. Have a great day.
